records.ety: [A native name; Knisteneaux mouswah; Algonquin monse. Mackenzie.]

defs: A large cervine mammal (Alces alces syn. Alces machlis, syn Alces Americanus), native of the Northern United States and Canada. The adult male is about as large as a horse, and has very large, palmate antlers. It closely resembles the European elk, and by many Zoologists is considered the same species. See Elk.
A member of the Progressive Party; a Bull Moose.
A member of the fraternal organization named Loyal Order of Moose.
